channel.title: About me on ZwerOxotnik's UC
channel.description: Recent content in About me on ZwerOxotnik's UC

item.title: Message to devs
item.description:
Message to devs#

GitHub isn’t reliable for repositories.
I don’t have solid solutions for public repositories, so it’s going to be more complex.

Discussion about development etc. etc. on Zulip: https://zweroxotnik.zulipchat.com (my user id: 1171961)

Git:

  • Main: https://gitgud.io/
  • Mirror: https://codeberg.org/
  • Archive/reference/for info: https://github.com/
  • Planned to migrate on: https://radicle.dev/

item.title: Factorio
item.description:
Factorio#

Don’t expect much changes.

You can see all my mods here: https://mods.factorio.com/user/ZwerOxotnik
Also, I have access to another mods too. You can find it on the site, using site’s search.

Currently, all Factorio repositories exist on GitHub: https://github.com/ZwerOxotnik?tab=repositories&q=factorio&type&language&sort
However, as soon as localization services will be changed, I’ll consider to migrate to another places.

I’ll respond to messages on official Factorio Discord, if I’m online.

My Factorio forum account: https://forums.factorio.com/memberlist.php?mode=viewprofile&u=50782
I rarely check the forum.

item.title: Socials
item.description:
Socials#

Lately, I use:

Discord: ZwerOxotnik (id: 131768209937268736)
Discord server: https://discordapp.com/invite/YyJVUCa
Steam: https://steamcommunity.com/id/ZwerOxotnik (https://findsteamid.com/steamid/76561198071983288)
Zulip: https://zweroxotnik.zulipchat.com (user id: 1171961)

I do have other aliases, but I usually use: Zweroxotni

You can find my drawings on:

  • https://www.furaffinity.net/user/zweroxotnik I post drawings on another sites, but more rarely.

Keep in mind, impersonification is common thing on social sites etc.

I’ll post later how to find me with Reticulum.

item.title: Payment
item.description:
Payment#

Currently, it’s better to contact me directly via email: zweroxotnik@gmail.com or/and ZwerOxotnik@proton.me
or/and validate my connection via socials in order to be sure that you contacted me, not an imposter.

I’m not always able to check email etc., and I might not notice new messages there (I don’t check spam folder) and I’m not always able to connect to sites etc.
However, I’m quite often on Discord despite issues, so inform me if you can.
